    graphics/gdal: switch to C++17 for upcoming poppler

    This is a fix-it-before-it-breaks for a poppler update that requires
    consumers (like gdal) to compile in C++17 mode.

    PR:             260956

 1 file changed, 4 insertions(+), 4 deletions(-)
